title: S10E05 'The Three Days' — sequence complete, CAVE-001 is the decision point
body: --findings Build 0107. The sequence 12-7-3-0 completes on Day 4 of CAVE-001 survey. Zero = this cave = December 1119 CE = the moment Tyler decided to build the archive. Ahmad ibn Yusuf surveyed CAVE-001 in December 1119; wrote 'A man camped at the summit. I asked him what he had seen. He was unable to answer.' Second geographic entry: Ahmad returned, then left for Marrakech on the third day. Tyler followed three days later. Two askings: the cave and the ship. Ahmad was in Marrakech when Tyler arrived and wrote the first word. CAVE-001 reclassified: ZERO-TAXONOMY / PRE-MECHANISM / SOURCE-SITE / DECISION-POINT. Mechanism produces first-ever reading of pre-archive decision-state. Footnote 101. TYLER-091, Camera Op Entry 84, Jiangshi Memo 071.
